Thank you for your interest in contributing to Gophertunnel. When working with AI tools, please follow these guidelines:

- Do not use LLMs in any GitHub discussions (issues, pull request comments, reviews). When making a contribution, you
  must describe what you did in your own words. You should be able to understand what your changes do without consulting
  an LLM. Issues that appear to be generated by LLMs may be closed.
    - Translators are excluded from this rule, but include the original text alongside the English version.
- When submitting pull requests, be transparent about any AI tools used to assist with your contribution, including the
  extent of their use. This does not need to be detailed; a brief note is sufficient.
- All pull requests must be tested by a human before being opened, regardless of AI usage.
- Keep pull requests focused on the relevant change or changes. Excessive whitespace changes or edits outside the scope
  of the pull request are not allowed.

Repeated violations or inappropriate use of AI tools may result in pull requests being closed or restrictions on contributing
to the Gophertunnel repository, including being permanently blocked. We understand that the codebase can be challenging for
newcomers, and we are happy to help those who are genuinely interested in contributing.

Thank you.
